mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_key ( user_id, key_hash, description, status ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{key_hash}, #{description}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM api_key WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM api_key WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM api_key WHERE key_hash = #{keyHash}
